item.title: [CVE-2021-3156] Exploiting Sudo heap overflow on Debian 10
item.description: Recently the Qualys Research Team did an amazing job discovering a Heap overflow vulnerability in Sudo. In the next sections, we will analyze the bug and we will write an exploit to gain root privileges on Debain 10.

item.title: [CUCTF 2020] Kernel Exploitation: Hotrod
item.description: Hotrod is a kernel exploitation challenge created by my friend FizzBuzz101 for CUCTF 2020. I tested the challenge before release and since the exploitation process was really interesting, I decided to write this article. In the next sections we will see how to get a root shell exploiting a UAF, using a single allocation, a timerfd_ctx structure and userfaultfd. Let’s start!

item.title: Ret2dl_resolve x64
item.description: In this article, we will start analyzing the lazy binding process, we will proceed dissecting dl-runtime, understanding when is possible to use this technique without a leak, and finally we will build our exploit.
